LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT INTER-CONTINENTAL HOTELS CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. THE DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE A PROOF OF SERVICE AT THE HEARING THAT COMPLIES WITH CCP 1013 (A) THAT IS EXECUTED BY A PERSON WITH PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE THAT THE MOVING PAPERS WERE DEPOSITED IN THE MAIL ON OR BEFORE 1/5/11. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
